ai_description: The photo shows a construction site with workers on a scaffolding platform, and the scaffolding appears to be properly set up with guardrails. However, one worker is standing near the edge of the platform without a visible personal fall arrest system or safety harness. The platform has the manufacturer's name 'FRACO' printed on it.
hazard_details: The worker on the right side of the platform is not wearing a visible safety harness or personal fall arrest system while standing near the edge, which could lead to a fall hazard.
